entries.name: Wand of Onyx
entries.description: It took 49 days to build it with the great power of the universe. It can be used with Holy Soul Package and Purple Dream Pakcage.

entries.name: Smoldering Wand
entries.description: It took 49 days to build it with the great power of the Eight Diagrams. It can be used with Devil Wing Package and Red Evil Package.

entries.name: Pestilent Wand
entries.description: It absorbed the power of dragon.;<n2 It can be used with Dragon King Package and Pheonix Soul Package.

entries.name: Wand of Voodoo
entries.description: It absorbed the soul of defeated fetch.;<n2 It can be used with Wolf Vortex Package and Crimson Bell Package.

entries.name: Wand of Eventide
entries.description: The soul of myriad year old ice was fused into this magical weapon.;<n2 It can be used with Warrior King Package;<n8 Snow Plume Package.

entries.name: Touch of Stillpine
entries.description: It is embed with the soul of blood ocean.;<n2It can be used with;<n8 Acheron Plume Package;<n8 Purple Phoenix Package.

entries.name: Touch of Spellcaster
entries.description: It is a very powerful weapon that contains infinite evil power.;<n2 It can be used with;<n8 Holy Plume Package;<n8 Fury Snow Package.

entries.name: Safari Rod
entries.description: It took 81 days to fuse nimbus from hell into this powerful weapon.;<n2 It can be used with;<n8 Wander Demon Package;<n8 Evil Sky Package.
